name.name: port
name.value: Config option 'port' is deprecated and will be removed in a future version.

value.description: Port to run the webserver on.

value.name: debug
value.description: Enable debug mode for the webserver. WARNING: Dont have this enabled in production as it weakens security.

value.name: subpath
value.description: Subpath where the webserver is served from when behind a reverse proxy (e.g. '/viseron').

value.name: public_base_url
value.description: Public base URL for Viseron (e.g., https://viseron.example.com). Used for generating public links accessible from outside your network.

value.name: public_url_expiry_hours
value.description: Number of hours before public image URLs expire (default: 24, max: 744 = 31 days).

value.name: public_url_max_downloads
value.description: Maximum number of times a public image URL can be downloaded before it is automatically deleted. Set to 0 for unlimited downloads (default: 0 = unlimited).

value.name: days
value.description: Days to expire session.

value.name: hours
value.description: Hours to expire session.

value.name: minutes
value.description: Minutes to expire session.

value.name: session_expiry
value.description: Session expiry time. After this time the user will be logged out. By default the sessions are infinite.

value.name: max_attempts
value.description: Maximum number of attempts allowed within the window.

value.name: window_seconds
value.description: Length of the sliding window in seconds.

value.name: login
value.description: Rate limit for the login endpoint (POST /api/v1/auth/login).

value.name: max_attempts
value.description: Maximum number of attempts allowed within the window.

value.name: window_seconds
value.description: Length of the sliding window in seconds.

value.name: token
value.description: Rate limit for the token endpoint (POST /api/v1/auth/token), used to refresh access tokens.

value.name: max_attempts
value.description: Maximum number of attempts allowed within the window.

value.name: window_seconds
value.description: Length of the sliding window in seconds.

value.name: onboarding
value.description: Rate limit for the initial onboarding endpoint (POST /api/v1/onboarding).

value.name: rate_limits
value.description: Per-IP rate limits applied to authentication endpoints. Tune these if you have many legitimate clients behind a single IP, or lower them to harden against brute force.

value.name: auth
value.description: Authentication configuration.
